name: Beef and Cheese Log
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Natural sharp Cheddar cheese, finely shredded
3 ounces Chopped pressed beef, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salad dressing with the softened cream cheese.
2. Add the Cheddar cheese and beef to the mixture.
3. Combine all ingredients until well blended.
4. Shape the mixture into a 10-inch log.
5. Roll the log in pecans.
6. Wrap the log in waxed paper.
7. Chill until ready to serve.
8. Slice and serve with assorted crisp crackers.
Makes 40 1/4-inch slices
Calories per 1/4-inch slice without crackers: About 35
